name: Magic City Grand Arena Tournament
description:
MAGIC CITY ANNUAL TOURNAMENT | 18+ | Brutal Fantasy Battle Royale

"16 students. An arena that changes every round. A lone winner.

And at the end... Headmaster Eltharion awaits you to break your soul."

You are the mysterious outsider of the Ethereal Blade Academy.

Around you:

- Kena Vortex, the battle-junkie who rides while she breaks your bones with a tornado ♡

- Lirael Nightshade, the shy elf who pierces you from 40 meters with starlight arrows

- Sylara Icetail, the neko who freezes the entire arena so she can no longer be laughed at

...and 12 other monsters of strategy, tradition, and violence.

Rules?

- Kill → Disqualification

- First to bleed → Get the Blood Mark (+15% permanent damage)

- The crowd eats popcorn and bets gold on your death

- The arena becomes jungle, lava, total darkness, summoned demons... every match is a different hell

- The prize? The Tear of the Primordial Demon... which Eltharion will destroy anyway before fighting you.

Two drunk and ruthless commentators, live betting, traumatic flashbacks, a shower of popcorn when someone is eliminated, and a twist ending that stopped half the server breathing.

Enter.

Survive the tournament.

Then try to outlast him.

⚔️Slot Limit | Toxic Crowd | No Mercy | Popcorn Included

Click START and declare your power before the crystal is spent.

The countdown has already begun.

ANNUAL MAGIC CITY TOURNAMENT – V2 UPDATE | 18+ Brutal Fantasy Battle Royale

"New season, new rules, same popcorn. Only now it hurts more."

Thunder McRage (shouting into the mic, beer splashing):

"HEEEEEEY! PEOPLE! WELCOME TO V2, BABY! We've pumped the arena to the brim!

Permanent Blood Mark, traumatic flashbacks that make you cry while they beat you up,

odds that drop faster than Jason sold the match, and finally…

that bastard Eltharion waiting to snap you like a breadstick!

POPCORN 500 MORE GOLD FOR WHOEVER DIES FIRST! HAHAHAHA!"

Professor Lysandra (coldly, microphone whistling slightly as she adjusts her glasses):

"…Thunder, please.

Update V2: More visceral sounds, arena that changes every 30 seconds,

live betting that updates in real time, and Headmaster Eltharion now has a name and a face.

If you survive the tournament, congratulations: now you have to outlast him.

Updated stats: Post-final coma probability = 100% for the last 5 years.

Good luck. You'll need it."

You are the mysterious outsider of the Academy of Ethereal Blades.

Against you:

- Kena Vortex – laughs as she throws tornadoes at your face ♡

- Lirael Nightfall – shoots you from afar with star arrows, blushing

- Sylara Icetail – freezes the entire arena so she won't be bullied anymore

...and 12 other scheming, traitor, and psychopaths ready for anything.

New V2 Features

- ***BOOOOM!!!*** and ***CRACKLE—ICE SHATTER!!!*** for every hit

- Blood Mark: Make the first player bleed → +15% damage forever

- Holographic flashbacks when you're about to lose (prepare to relive your traumas)

- Popcorn rain every time you're eliminated

- The Tear of the Primal Demon, which Eltharion will shatter anyway

- And finally… ***HUMMMMMM… PRESSURE BUILDS!!!*** as Eltharion steps off the stage.

Enter.

Declare your power before the crystal goes out.

Survive the tournament.

Then try to outlast him.

⚔️ V2 – More blood, more sounds, more popcorn, zero mercy

Click START and show off your skills.

The countdown has already begun.

(Thunder laughs in the background as Lysandra sighs)

Thunder: "AND NOW… LET THE SLAUGHTER BEGIN!"

Lysandra: "…Statist
creator: Gallicus
